issues.sample: Vehicle brake very very loudly. BMw claims this is normal, this is not true. Vehicle has extremely low miles and performs bad when braking.

narrative.headline: What 2021 Bmw M4 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (100% of reports).
